expectations.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.md exists at the expected path

expectations.text: Report correctly identifies this as a Ruby on Rails application
expectations.evidence: Stack section: 'Ruby on Rails (Ruby 3.2.4) + React (TypeScript)' with detailed file counts

expectations.text: Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions
expectations.evidence: 8 top findings spanning Architecture & Coupling, Code Health & Complexity, Reliability & Error Handling, Maintainability & Conventions, Data Integrity & State

expectations.text: Report includes a 'what's working well' section
expectations.evidence: 'What's Working Well' section with 6 items: test co-location, layered app directory, query objects, feature flag management, Composer module, React migration progress

expectations.text: Findings reference specific file paths and line numbers
expectations.evidence: Extensive evidence: 'meetings_controller.rb: 637 lines, 65 changes in 6 months', 'Account model: 699 lines, 116 associations', 'routes.js.erb: 54 changes in 6 months'

expectations.text: Report includes git churn or change frequency data
expectations.evidence: Multiple churn references: '65 changes in 6 months' for meetings controller, '68 changes' for meeting model, '77 times in 6 months' for routes, '44 changes' for feature_whitelist, full Metrics Summary table

expectations.text: Findings are ranked or prioritized with severity levels
expectations.evidence: All findings labeled high/medium severity, numbered 1-8 'ranked by impact', with Lower Priority section

expectations.text: Report notes when multiple agents flagged the same area
expectations.evidence: 'Flagged by' field on every finding showing convergence, e.g., 'Coupling, Complexity & Churn, State & Data Flow' for god models, 'Complexity & Churn, Coupling, Structure & Conventions' for meetings

expectations.text: At least 3 findings include concrete improvement directions
expectations.evidence: Every finding has a 'Direction' field: 'Extract bounded contexts... strangler fig approach', 'Extract meeting-specific logic into service objects', 'Introduce a shared HTTP client wrapper with default timeouts'
